mapper.select:
SELECT WORDNAME AS label,WORDNAME AS value FROM SYNLTE.SAMEWORD
WHERE upper(WORDNAME) like upper('%${query}%')

SELECT distinct FIELDCHINESENAME AS label,FIELDCHINESENAME AS value FROM SYNLTE.SYNLTEFIELD
WHERE upper(FIELDCHINESENAME) like upper('%${query}%')

select a.FIELDID,a.FIELDCHINESENAME,b.WORDNAME as sameName from SYNLTE.SYNLTEFIELD a inner join synlte.sameword b on a.SAMEID = b.SAMEID where b.WORDNAME in
#{item}
SELECT FIELDID, FIELDCHINESENAME FROM SYNLTE.SYNLTEFIELD WHERE FIELDCHINESENAME LIKE '%${elementChSet}%'

SELECT a.OBJECTID, a.FIELDID, b.NAME as tableNameCh, b.TABLENAME as tableNameEn FROM SYNLTE.OBJECTFIELD a INNER JOIN CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE b ON a.OBJECTID = b.OBJECTID WHERE a.fieldId IN
#{item.fieldId}
